case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLL VS. DONTA PERRY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERRY, DONTA $4,739.78 PRINCIPAL, $2,360.15 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,099.93

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION FOR AND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT & NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLL SERVED OCT-16-2024, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, DONTA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,360.15 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, DONTA

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.99 - SERVED SEP-18-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, DONTA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF - DEFENDANT'S CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO / TAX COLL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERRY, DONTA $4,693.79 PRINCIPAL, $45.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,739.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
